name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
highlights: Powerful Bass: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds have oversized 10mm drivers that deliver powerful sound with boosted bass so you can lose yourself in your favorite songs.
Personalized Listening Experience: Use the soundcore app to customize the controls and choose from 22 EQ presets. With "Find My Earbuds", a lost earbud can emit noise to help you locate it.

Long Playtime, Fast Charging: Get 10 hours of battery life on a single charge with a case that extends it to 30 hours. If P20i true wireless earbuds are low on power, a quick 10-minute charge will give you 2 hours of playtime.

Portable On-the-Go Design: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space.
AI-Enhanced Clear Calls: 2 built-in mics and an AI algorithm work together to pick up your voice so that you never have to shout over the phone.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Awesome ear set -- can't be beat at this price point
reviews.body: Outstanding! For the low price (~$20), this is an amazing ear set. I have been using Apple Airpods and then SamSung Buds for the past 6 years. As expected, this set does not have all the features like Apple's or Samsung's, but having used this set for several months, now I am wondering if I ever really needed those features (for a price of $150-200!). Great sound, long battery, light but solid build quality, coupled with no fear of losing! The only thing is that when I drop it on the floor, it opens up. Each pod is made of two pieces, which separate as it hits the floor. After having to click them back together several times, I added superglue before click them back on both sides. Now they don't open up. Definitely recommend this set.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: best buds for the price. look no further.
reviews.body: I never write reviews, but I have to for this product. Just as most have said, these are AWESOME. I have had nothing but bad experiences with other wireless earbuds so I stayed away from them. But as my over the ear headphones of 8 years stopped working, I had to buy new headphones so I decided to give them another chance. I kept hearing good things about Soundcore so I trusted the reviews and they live up to the hype completely. The audio quality of course isn't the best, but it's clear enough, loud enough, and has enough fidelity not just for the pricepoint, but in my honest opinion exceeds it. But the most important thing of all, connectivity. That is the number one factor when looking for wireless earbuds. Many earbuds have decent quality, but if they don't stay connected, who cares. These always stay connected. Previous earbuds, the right would connect but not the left. This is because with other earbuds the right is the primary connected device, while the left is connected to the right bud. With these, it seems both buds are connected simultaneously. Also, these aren't just good for music and movies, even in games they don't lose their synchronicity. Only one problem, when I tried playing a PC game and watching a movie at the same time, the buds did cause significant lag and input delays in my game, but that is totally forgiveable. When the buds are dedicated just t your game and not to another app they work very decently. Most wireless earbuds I tried in the past always had this problem of synchronizing to games. I am absolutely blown away at the quality of these for the price. The biggest downside I have heard is they only last about a year before they stop being functional. But still, for only $20 these are unbeatable if you're on a budget. I recommend the a20i over the p20i as the bass is a little too loud, but you can easily fix this by downloading the soundcore app and choosing the "reduce bass" EQ setting. Also, these are bluetooth only. They don't utilize a USB dongle. So if you have an older laptop or desktop that doesn't have bluetooth, you will need to purchase either a bluetooth dongle or a bluetooth/wifi PCI-E card for your desktop.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Incredible, beats Gen 1 Airpods at $20 on sale. Great Bang-4-Buck!
reviews.body: Anker makes really good stuff all the time. For a really good price no less. They are a real bang-for-buck type company in the best way meaning possible. These earbuds are genuinely very impressive. I’d say they are most definitely better than Airpod gen 1’s. The cups are excellent and cut off any outside noise. The bass is very smooth for this price point, the vocals are clear, maybe the treble is a little overpowered by the bass, but besides the bigger charging case and slightly bigger appearance and fit, these are superior to gen 1 airpods for sure and for $20 on sale you literally cannot beat this with any other option. The charge hold time is excellent too and the case charges fast.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026
reviews.title: One of the Worlds BEST Earpods
reviews.body: I bought two of these, They Worked Great but after around 9 months they lose their spark and for me the bluetooth isnt working anymore, And also The magnet loses its strenght and when dropped the earbuds fly out, Other than that they are AWESOME, they fit well, they sound better than 99% of the earpods, they are around the same size as a airpod, And they have touch contols! If you are looking for a Budget Earpod without Noise cancellation, You should pick These, they will last you around 9 -12 months if used daily👍

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 6, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound and battery life for the price
reviews.body: These earbuds are impressive for the price. The sound quality is clear with strong bass, thanks to the 10mm drivers, and they work well for music, videos, and calls. The app with EQ presets is a nice bonus—you can easily customize the sound to your preference.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 22, 2026
reviews.title: These earbuds went through my washer twice and still work! Amazing!
reviews.body: These earbuds get a true 5 stars for multiple reasons.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: These headphones don’t have location only sound so if they die it won’t play anything
reviews.body: These earbuds are really good the sound quality doesn’t sound cheap at all and the noise cancellation is really good and can’t hear anything with both earbuds on and they are crisp and really good the battery life is also really great I tested the battery life on the earbuds without the case full charge it lasted the whole night intell close to afternoon and the case too lasted days by one charge and I also dropped these in water it also been in rain and they are perfect the control are really easy and can customize them in the app it feels cheap but they are really tuff wean it comes to drops and for 19 dollars they are worth it probably better then any cheap headphones I have ever used

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
reviews.title: They’re fine but not my favorite.
reviews.body: I gave these ear pods three stars because I really haven’t had big issues with them - they are just a basic, mediocre set of ear buds in my opinion. I bought these to use until I can afford new AirPods. They are fine, but there are definitely things I dislike about them. The sound quality is just ok, and sometimes it’ll do this thing where the sound goes in and out. That doesn’t happen often, thankfully. Also, they do not stop playing the audio if you take them out of your ears and don’t put them right in the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Australia on March 11, 2026
reviews.title: Incredible for the price
reviews.body: Excellent product. Great sound. Easy to connect, great battery life, not a massively long range connection (although my other earbuds are Bose so can't really compete) so you need to stay near your phone, in saying that... They're still well worth it for the price. This is my second pair as I like having multiples as I use them so much. So obviously it shows they're great.

reviews.date: Reviewed in India on August 5, 2025
reviews.title: Banger earbuds !!
reviews.body: Excellent quality sound with advance dedicated mobile app.... Its very impressive

reviews.date: Reviewed in Egypt on February 6, 2026
reviews.title: ممتاز جدا
reviews.body: ممتاز جدا و العلبه مقفوله

reviews.date: Reviewed in Spain on April 22, 2026
reviews.title: óptimos.
reviews.body: En mi opinión, son los mejores que te puedes comprar por unos 20€, suenan estupendo y fuerte, la batería dura mucho, no cuesta sacarlos del cofre ( que hay algunos que no veas ), se conectan al instante, y no los paras sin querer al mínimo roce ( lo cual da bastante rabia ).

reviews.date: Reviewed in Sweden on April 22, 2026
reviews.title: Best quality!!!
reviews.body: Jag har en dålig vana – jag sover med hörlurar. Mina dyrare hörlurar gick alltid sönder efter typ 3 månader (rör mig för mycket i sömnen 😅). Så jag började köpa billigare istället. Men den här modellen… har hållit i över ett år, batteriet är fortfarande grymt och inget har gått sönder. Riktigt bra hörlurar!

reviews.body: I never write reviews, but I have to for this product. Just as most have said, these are AWESOME. I have had nothing but bad experiences with other wireless earbuds so I stayed away from them. But as my over the ear headphones of 8 years stopped working, I had to buy new headphones so I decided to give them another chance. I kept hearing good things about Soundcore so I trusted the reviews and they live up to the hype completely. The audio quality of course isn't the best, but it's clear enough, loud enough, and has enough fidelity not just for the pricepoint, but in my honest opinion exceeds it. But the most important thing of all, connectivity. That is the number one factor when looking for wireless earbuds. Many earbuds have decent quality, but if they don't stay connected, who cares. These always stay connected. Previous earbuds, the right would connect but not the left. This is because with other earbuds the right is the primary connected device, while the left is connected to the right bud. With these, it seems both buds are connected simultaneously. Also, these aren't just good for music and movies, even in games they don't lose their synchronicity. Only one problem, when I tried playing a PC game and watching a movie at the same time, the buds did cause significant lag and input delays in my game, but that is totally forgiveable. When the buds are dedicated just t your game and not to another app they work very decently. Most wireless earbuds I tried in the past always had this problem of synchronizing to games. I am absolutely blown away at the quality of these for the price. The biggest downside I have heard is they only last about a year before they stop being functional. But still, for only $20 these are unbeatable if you're on a budget. I recommend the a20i over the p20i as the bass is a little too loud, but you can easily fix this by downloading the soundcore app and choosing the "reduce bass" EQ setting. Also, these are bluetooth only. They don't utilize a USB dongle. So if you have an older laptop or desktop that doesn't have bluetooth, you will need to purchase either a bluetooth dongle or a bluetooth/wifi PCI-E card for your desktop.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Incredible, beats Gen 1 Airpods at $20 on sale. Great Bang-4-Buck!
reviews.body: Anker makes really good stuff all the time. For a really good price no less. They are a real bang-for-buck type company in the best way meaning possible. These earbuds are genuinely very impressive. I’d say they are most definitely better than Airpod gen 1’s. The cups are excellent and cut off any outside noise. The bass is very smooth for this price point, the vocals are clear, maybe the treble is a little overpowered by the bass, but besides the bigger charging case and slightly bigger appearance and fit, these are superior to gen 1 airpods for sure and for $20 on sale you literally cannot beat this with any other option. The charge hold time is excellent too and the case charges fast.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026
reviews.title: One of the Worlds BEST Earpods
reviews.body: I bought two of these, They Worked Great but after around 9 months they lose their spark and for me the bluetooth isnt working anymore, And also The magnet loses its strenght and when dropped the earbuds fly out, Other than that they are AWESOME, they fit well, they sound better than 99% of the earpods, they are around the same size as a airpod, And they have touch contols! If you are looking for a Budget Earpod without Noise cancellation, You should pick These, they will last you around 9 -12 months if used daily👍

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 6, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound and battery life for the price
reviews.body: These earbuds are impressive for the price. The sound quality is clear with strong bass, thanks to the 10mm drivers, and they work well for music, videos, and calls. The app with EQ presets is a nice bonus—you can easily customize the sound to your preference.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 22, 2026
reviews.title: These earbuds went through my washer twice and still work! Amazing!
reviews.body: These earbuds get a true 5 stars for multiple reasons.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: These headphones don’t have location only sound so if they die it won’t play anything
reviews.body: These earbuds are really good the sound quality doesn’t sound cheap at all and the noise cancellation is really good and can’t hear anything with both earbuds on and they are crisp and really good the battery life is also really great I tested the battery life on the earbuds without the case full charge it lasted the whole night intell close to afternoon and the case too lasted days by one charge and I also dropped these in water it also been in rain and they are perfect the control are really easy and can customize them in the app it feels cheap but they are really tuff wean it comes to drops and for 19 dollars they are worth it probably better then any cheap headphones I have ever used

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
reviews.title: They’re fine but not my favorite.
reviews.body: I gave these ear pods three stars because I really haven’t had big issues with them - they are just a basic, mediocre set of ear buds in my opinion. I bought these to use until I can afford new AirPods. They are fine, but there are definitely things I dislike about them. The sound quality is just ok, and sometimes it’ll do this thing where the sound goes in and out. That doesn’t happen often, thankfully. Also, they do not stop playing the audio if you take them out of your ears and don’t put them right in the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Australia on March 11, 2026
reviews.title: Incredible for the price
reviews.body: Excellent product. Great sound. Easy to connect, great battery life, not a massively long range connection (although my other earbuds are Bose so can't really compete) so you need to stay near your phone, in saying that... They're still well worth it for the price. This is my second pair as I like having multiples as I use them so much. So obviously it shows they're great.

reviews.body: Excellent quality sound with advance dedicated mobile app.... Its very impressive

reviews.body: En mi opinión, son los mejores que te puedes comprar por unos 20€, suenan estupendo y fuerte, la batería dura mucho, no cuesta sacarlos del cofre ( que hay algunos que no veas ), se conectan al instante, y no los paras sin querer al mínimo roce ( lo cual da bastante rabia ).

reviews.date: Reviewed in Sweden on April 22, 2026
reviews.title: Best quality!!!
reviews.body: Jag har en dålig vana – jag sover med hörlurar. Mina dyrare hörlurar gick alltid sönder efter typ 3 månader (rör mig för mycket i sömnen 😅). Så jag började köpa billigare istället. Men den här modellen… har hållit i över ett år, batteriet är fortfarande grymt och inget har gått sönder. Riktigt bra hörlurar!

name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization (White)
availability: FREE delivery May 11 - 22 to Philippines on eligible orders over PHP 3,010.07
highlights: Powerful Bass: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds have oversized 10mm drivers that deliver powerful sound with boosted bass so you can lose yourself in your favorite songs.
Personalized Listening Experience: Use the soundcore app to customize the controls and choose from 22 EQ presets. With "Find My Earbuds", a lost earbud can emit noise to help you locate it.

Long Playtime, Fast Charging: Get 10 hours of battery life on a single charge with a case that extends it to 30 hours. If P20i true wireless earbuds are low on power, a quick 10-minute charge will give you 2 hours of playtime.

Portable On-the-Go Design: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space.
AI-Enhanced Clear Calls: 2 built-in mics and an AI algorithm work together to pick up your voice so that you never have to shout over the phone.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Awesome ear set -- can't be beat at this price point
reviews.body: Outstanding! For the low price (~$20), this is an amazing ear set. I have been using Apple Airpods and then SamSung Buds for the past 6 years. As expected, this set does not have all the features like Apple's or Samsung's, but having used this set for several months, now I am wondering if I ever really needed those features (for a price of $150-200!). Great sound, long battery, light but solid build quality, coupled with no fear of losing! The only thing is that when I drop it on the floor, it opens up. Each pod is made of two pieces, which separate as it hits the floor. After having to click them back together several times, I added superglue before click them back on both sides. Now they don't open up. Definitely recommend this set.

name: HAOYUYAN Wireless Earbuds, Sports Bluetooth Headphones, 80Hrs Playtime Ear Buds with LED Power Display, Noise Canceling Headset, IPX7 Waterproof Earphones for Workout/Running(Black)
highlights: 【Sports Comfort & IPX7 Waterproof】Designed for extended workouts, the BX17 earbuds feature flexible ear hooks and three sizes of silicone tips for a secure, personalized fit. The IPX7 waterproof rating ensures protection against sweat, rain, and accidental submersion (up to 1 meter for 30 minutes), making them ideal for intense training, running, or outdoor adventures

【Immersive Sound & Noise Cancellation】Equipped with 14.3mm dynamic drivers and advanced acoustic tuning, these earbuds deliver powerful bass, crisp highs, and balanced mids. The ergonomic design enhances passive noise isolation, while the built-in microphone ensures clear voice pickup during calls—even in noisy environments

【Type-C Fast Charging & Tactile Controls】Recharge the case in 1.5 hours via USB-C and get back to your routine quickly. Intuitive physical buttons let you adjust volume, skip tracks, answer calls, and activate voice assistants without touching your phone—perfect for sweaty or gloved hands

【80-Hour Playtime & Real-Time LED Display】Enjoy up to 15 hours of playtime per charge (80 hours total with the portable charging case). The dual LED screens on the case display precise battery levels at a glance, so you’ll never run out of power mid-workout

【Auto-Pairing & Universal Compatibility】Hall switch technology enables instant pairing: simply open the case to auto-connect to your last-used device. Compatible with iOS, Android, tablets, and laptops (Bluetooth 5.3), these earbuds ensure stable connectivity up to 33 feet

【Eco-Friendly & Sustainable Design】BX17 Wireless Earbuds are designed with eco-conscious materials and energy-efficient technology to reduce environmental impact. The durable build and long-lasting battery minimize waste, while, energy-saving features ensure lower power consumption. By choosing BX17, you’re not only enjoying premium audio but also supporting sustainable practices for a greener future

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2026
reviews.title: Comfortable and great for workouts
reviews.body: I bought these wireless sports earbuds and they’ve been a great choice, especially for exercising. The first thing that stands out is the ear hook design, which keeps them securely in place even when running or doing intense movements.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2026
reviews.title: Excellent value for everyday use 🎧
reviews.body: The HAOYUYAN earbuds pleasantly surprised me with their sound quality and comfort. They fit securely in the ear, making them ideal for workouts or long listening sessions without discomfort. The battery lasts a long time, and the charging case powers up quickly. The Bluetooth connection is stable and easy to use. For the price, they offer very good quality. Recommended if you’re looking for something functional and affordable

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: Budget-Friendly Hearing Aids with Decent Performan
reviews.body: For the price, these hearing aids are a reasonable option if you’re looking for something very affordable. They are lightweight and come with a charging case, which is convenient for daily use. The sound amplification works, especially in quiet environments, but it may struggle a bit with background noise despite the advertised noise cancellation.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 23, 2026
reviews.title: Good fit, nice sound, great price
reviews.body: These are great! I love that they're pink. The sound quality is good for the price, as I had no interest in paying hundreds of dollars for a name brand. I have small ears, so I was worried they wouldn't fit right, but it comes with different size covers (?). I just have to use the small ones. Battery life is good. The only complaint I have is that sometimes when I readjust them in my ear, it's easy to inadvertanly adjust the volume, which is a bit annoying. Maybe that's a just a user error, though. Still, I'm happy I purchased these.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2026
reviews.title: Good quality!
reviews.body: These wireless earbuds are a great budget-friendly option. The design is comfortable and lightweight, making them easy to wear for long periods without discomfort. Pairing was quick and simple, and the connection stays stable. The sound quality is surprisingly clear with decent bass for everyday use like music, calls, or videos. I also like the compact charging case, which is easy to carry around and helps extend battery life. Overall, a solid choice if you want affordable, reliable earbuds.

name: HAOYUYAN Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, Ear Buds with 80hr Playtime, LED Power Display, Noise Canceling, LED Power Display, IPX7 Waterproof Earphones for Gym/Workout/Sport（Dark Blue）
highlights: 【Sports Comfort & IPX7 Waterproof】 Designed with elastic, soft ear hooks and three-sized ear tips, the BX17 wireless earbuds stay securely in place for ultimate comfort during workouts. The IPX7 waterproof rating resists sweat and water splashes, making them ideal for sports, fitness, running, and intense exercise.

【Fast Pairing & Wide Compatibility】 Hall switch technology enables automatic power-on and instant reconnection to your last paired device when the charging case opens—no manual setup required. Enjoy seamless compatibility with most Bluetooth devices.

【ENC Noise Cancelling & Immersive Stereo Sound】 14.3mm drivers and an in-ear acoustic structure deliver punchy bass and crisp treble. The ENC technology and balanced air pressure design minimize sound leakage and ambient noise, ensuring clear calls and immersive audio even in loud environments—perfect for work, workouts, or downtime.

【Upgraded 80H Playtime & LED Power Display】 The upgraded BX17 offers 15 hours per charge (80 hours total Noise Cancellation15 hours longer than the 1st gen. The case provides 8 full recharges, while the dual LED display shows real-time battery levels when opened or closed.

【Type-C Fast Charging & Intuitive Touch Controls】 A Type-C fast-charging case ensures quick power-ups. Effortlessly manage music, calls, and volume with one-touch button controls—all designed for a smooth, user-friendly experience.

name: HAOYUYAN Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth 5.3 Headphones with 80H Playback, IPX7 Waterproof Over Ear Buds with LED Power Display for Sports Running Workouts Gray Black
description:
Product Description
The T16 wireless earbuds combine sports-ready comfort with powerful performance, featuring elastic ear hooks and three-sized tips for a secure, sweat-proof (IPX7) fit during workouts. Hall switch tech enables instant auto-pairing, while 14.3mm drivers and ENC deliver immersive stereo sound and crystal-clear calls. Enjoy 15 hours of playtime (80hrs total with case) with LED power monitoring, Type-C fast charging, and intuitive one-touch controls—perfect for fitness, travel, or daily use.
highlights: 【Impeccable Sound & Loud Call】- Equipped with 14.2mm speaker, the wireless headphones deliver well-balanced and exceptional sound, ensuring every note and beat is crisp and immersive. And the built-in microphone and snug fit design will effectively filters out noise during calls, guaranting seamless call quality for those important conversations on the go. Immerse yourself in crystal-clear audio and indulge in high-fidelity music

【Extended 80 Hours Playback】- Our T16 wireless earbuds boast a 70mAh battery, allowing up to 8 hours for continuous use (at 50%-60% volume) on a single charge. With the 600mAh large-capacity charging case, you can enjoy a total playtime of approximately 90 hours, you can keep grooving to your favorite tunes all day long. With an external digital LED display on the charging station, you can easily keep track of the battery level without opening the case and plan your charging accordingly

【Sports Comfort & IPX7 Waterproof】- Designed with elastic and soft ear hooks, these Bluetooth sports earbuds stay securely in place and provide ultimate comfort even during extended workout sessions. The earphones come with three different sizes of ear tips, ensuring a perfect fit for various ear sizes. With an IPX7 waterproof rating, they effectively resist water splashes and sweat, making them ideal for sports, fitness, workouts, and running

【Bluetooth 5.3 for Seamless Pairing】- Thanks to the advanced Bluetooth 5.3 technology, pairing and connecting to your device has never been faster and easier. Say goodbye to any frustrating lag or connection drops. Just open the charging case lid, the wireless headsets will quickly connect with your device automatically (after 1st successful connection). And they are widely compatible with most Bluetooth-enabled devices including Phone or Android or Windows, smart TV, laptop, tablets etc

【Effortless Charging & Intuitive Touch Control】- You can use the fast Type-C cable. The sensitive touch control feature provides a hassle-free user experience, you can stay in control of your audio experience with one-touch, making it easy to control the music playback, adjust the volume, and manage calls with a simple touch, putting all the operation at your fingertips

【Eco-Friendly & Sustainable Design】T16 Wireless Earbuds are designed with eco-conscious materials and energy-efficient technology to reduce environmental impact. The durable build and long-lasting battery minimize waste, while, energy-saving features ensure lower power consumption. By choosing T16, you’re not only enjoying premium audio but also supporting sustainable practices for a greener future

name: Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones, 50H Playtime Ear Buds with Mic, LED Digital Display Charging Case, IPX7 Waterproof, Deep Bass Stereo, in-Ear Earphone for iPhone Andriod Phone - Ink
highlights: 50-Hours Power Marathon & LED Power Tracker: The built-in LED display shows exact remaining power (0-100%), while the 500mAh portable charging case delivers a whopping 50 hours of total playtime by alternating between wireless earbuds. Built tough with 500+ charge cycles, these ear buds are future-proof.

Bluetooth 5.3 Earbuds & Rock-Solid 49 ft Range: The latest Bluetooth 5.3 keeps your audio perfectly synced up to 49 feet (15m) away. Pop them open and take the earbuds out - they instantly auto-pair with your last device! No more pairing headaches. Plus, our upgraded sweat-resistant charging contacts (magnetic + gold-plated) mean your gym sessions won't ruin the charge. Workout worry-free!

HD Stereo + Crystal-Clear Mic: Custom 14.5mm titanium drivers (50% larger than standard) deliver sparkling highs and punchy bass, revealing musical details most wireless earbuds lose. Advanced audio codec support ensures minimal signal compression for studio-quality sound and exceptional call clarity.

Sweatproof Grip & All-Day Comfort (0.14oz/ear): The ergonomic semi-in-ear design creates perfect 360° weight distribution. The premium sandblasted non-slip coating provides 3x the grip of regular Bluetooth headphones— they'll stay put even during your most intense workouts. Three silicone tip sizes (X/S/L) ensure comfort for small ears and glasses-wearers.

Newbie-Proof Controls: Master your music and calls without touching your phone! Triple-tap to talk to Siri, press and hold to adjust volume, or double-tap to skip tracks. For even easier use, Nequga has expanded the touch control area on each earbud for more precise and reliable commands. Totally user-friendly!

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Phones/Sports/Laptop, White
highlights: 2026 Bluetooth 5.4 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.4 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 15 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.

More Outstanding ENC Noise Reduction: Powered by dual 14.2 mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers and a built-in high-resolution decoder, these wireless headphones deliver immersive, high-fidelity sound with AAC and SBC support.Advanced ENC call noise cancellation ensures crystal-clear voice quality, even in noisy environments—bringing you a truly elevated audio experience with the A90 noise-cancelling earbuds.

LED Power Display & Easy Touch Control: The smart LED display keeps you informed of the remaining battery of both the charging case and wireless earphones, giving you full control over your listening time wherever you go. Simply tap the earbuds wireless bluetooth to control music playback, manage calls, or wake your voice assistant—hands-free convenience, no phone needed.

36 Hours Playtime & Faster Charging: Enjoy 6–8 hours of uninterrupted listening on one charge, with up to 36 hours of total battery life when used with the charging case. The Type-C fast charging design delivers safer, more efficient power, keeping your noise cancelling headphones ready whenever you need them.

Ergonomic & IP7 Waterproof: Thanks to an ultra-light nano coating, these true wireless earbuds are IP7 waterproof and dustproof—perfect for workouts or outdoor adventures. The ergonomic in-ear design and soft silicone tips provide a secure, comfortable fit while keeping outside noise out, letting you immerse yourself fully in your music.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: Better than Apple AirPods!
reviews.body: I love these earbuds! They have a silicone tip which is far more comfortable than the AirPods. They fit snugly and block out other noise. They paired easily and quickly to my TV.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones in white, and I am incredibly impressed with their performance. These earbuds deserve a solid 5-star rating!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: BUY THEM!!
reviews.body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Very good but note it has a strong "V" shaped spectrum
reviews.body: This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect alternative to AirPods
reviews.body: These work great! The sound quality is extremely good. The color of the green one is exact. I bought a second pair for my boyfriend especially since these were affordable. The battery life is longer than my Beats. Also these feel comfortable in my ears with no problem. Def worth it

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: Never fails me.
reviews.body: I'm a simple guy. I like earbuds that are cheap, loud and have decent noise cancelling. And any earbuds like this will do just that. You don't have to spend $25-$40 for something exactly the same as these but have better reviews. Remember that things are user based. 1 user may have a bad experience while another will have a great experience.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
reviews.title: Surprised and impressed
reviews.body: I bought a pair of these as a gift because she was tired of how quickly her preferred brand's earbuds (Jlab) break down. I was looking for something that seemed good for a lower price to test out, and we were both really surprised. These are great. I'd say they're better than most premium brands. So much so that I bought a pair for myself.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 16, 2026
reviews.title: Great Earbuds!
reviews.body: I bought these earbuds for my TV because my cat doesn’t like noise. They work perfectly and have great sound. They connect automatically when I turn on the TV, which is nice not having to change the TV settings every time. I originally bought Apple AirPods for my TV, but I had so many problems keeping the connection working. It was probably an Apple/Android incompatibility thing. Either way, these earbuds work absolutely perfectly and I’m super happy with them!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 7, 2024
reviews.title: Amazing quality for such a low price point no
reviews.body: So to be fair, I really didn’t expect much for the low price point of these. There are very expensive earbuds on the market but I wanted something affordable for my husband to use as to be honest I wasn’t sure how well he would look after them or how much he would use them.

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Phones/Sports/Laptop, Black
highlights: 2026 Bluetooth 5.4 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.4 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 15 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.

More Outstanding ENC Noise Reduction: Powered by dual 14.2 mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers and a built-in high-resolution decoder, these wireless headphones deliver immersive, high-fidelity sound with AAC and SBC support.Advanced ENC call noise cancellation ensures crystal-clear voice quality, even in noisy environments—bringing you a truly elevated audio experience with the A90 noise-cancelling earbuds.

LED Power Display & Easy Touch Control: The smart LED display keeps you informed of the remaining battery of both the charging case and wireless earphones, giving you full control over your listening time wherever you go. Simply tap the earbuds wireless bluetooth to control music playback, manage calls, or wake your voice assistant—hands-free convenience, no phone needed.

36 Hours Playtime & Faster Charging: Enjoy 6–8 hours of uninterrupted listening on one charge, with up to 36 hours of total battery life when used with the charging case. The Type-C fast charging design delivers safer, more efficient power, keeping your noise cancelling headphones ready whenever you need them.

Ergonomic & IP7 Waterproof: Thanks to an ultra-light nano coating, these true wireless earbuds are IP7 waterproof and dustproof—perfect for workouts or outdoor adventures. The ergonomic in-ear design and soft silicone tips provide a secure, comfortable fit while keeping outside noise out, letting you immerse yourself fully in your music.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: Better than Apple AirPods!
reviews.body: I love these earbuds! They have a silicone tip which is far more comfortable than the AirPods. They fit snugly and block out other noise. They paired easily and quickly to my TV.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones in white, and I am incredibly impressed with their performance. These earbuds deserve a solid 5-star rating!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: BUY THEM!!
reviews.body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Very good but note it has a strong "V" shaped spectrum
reviews.body: This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect alternative to AirPods
reviews.body: These work great! The sound quality is extremely good. The color of the green one is exact. I bought a second pair for my boyfriend especially since these were affordable. The battery life is longer than my Beats. Also these feel comfortable in my ears with no problem. Def worth it

name: Btootos Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth 5.3 Headphones Bass Stereo Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic LED Display in Ear Earphones IP7 Waterproof 36H Playtime for Laptop Pad Phones Sports Graphite Gray
highlights: 2025 Bluetooth 5.4 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.4 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 15 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.

More Outstanding ENC Noise Reduction : The wireless headphones adopts dual 14.2mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers with high resolution decoder built-in and AAC&SBC audio coding technology. In addition, the ENC calling noise cancellation technology brings a clearer sound to your calls, giving you a whole better feeling, everything from the A90 noise cancelling earbuds.

LED Power Display : The LED display on the charging case shows you the charge level of the case as well as the wireless earphones, so you can precisely control the charge level of your headphones wireless for your convenience on the go. Simply tap on the earbuds wireless bluetooth to skip songs, play/pause music, answer/hang up phone calls, activate voice assistant, all without taking out your phone.

36 Hours and Faster Charging: The bluetooth earphones offer up to 6-8 hours of usage on a single charge, with the charging case supporting up to 30 hours of usage, ensuring all-day usage. The wireless bluetooth headphones feature a Type-C charging port, providing a more stable and secure charging method, and significantly extending the battery life of the noise cancelling headphones.

Ergonomic IP7 Waterproof Design : With ultra-light Nano coating, the headphones with mic reach IP7 waterproof grade, dust and rain proof, the extreme lightness, the in-ear design in line with the shape of human ears, and the softer silicone ear cap, make you feel comfortable in any scene and can only hear your own music, all from this true wireless ear buds.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: Better than Apple AirPods!
reviews.body: I love these earbuds! They have a silicone tip which is far more comfortable than the AirPods. They fit snugly and block out other noise. They paired easily and quickly to my TV.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones in white, and I am incredibly impressed with their performance. These earbuds deserve a solid 5-star rating!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: BUY THEM!!
reviews.body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Very good but note it has a strong "V" shaped spectrum
reviews.body: This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Perfect alternative to AirPods
reviews.body: These work great! The sound quality is extremely good. The color of the green one is exact. I bought a second pair for my boyfriend especially since these were affordable. The battery life is longer than my Beats. Also these feel comfortable in my ears with no problem. Def worth it

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: Never fails me.
reviews.body: I'm a simple guy. I like earbuds that are cheap, loud and have decent noise cancelling. And any earbuds like this will do just that. You don't have to spend $25-$40 for something exactly the same as these but have better reviews. Remember that things are user based. 1 user may have a bad experience while another will have a great experience.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
reviews.title: Surprised and impressed
reviews.body: I bought a pair of these as a gift because she was tired of how quickly her preferred brand's earbuds (Jlab) break down. I was looking for something that seemed good for a lower price to test out, and we were both really surprised. These are great. I'd say they're better than most premium brands. So much so that I bought a pair for myself.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 16, 2026
reviews.title: Great Earbuds!
reviews.body: I bought these earbuds for my TV because my cat doesn’t like noise. They work perfectly and have great sound. They connect automatically when I turn on the TV, which is nice not having to change the TV settings every time. I originally bought Apple AirPods for my TV, but I had so many problems keeping the connection working. It was probably an Apple/Android incompatibility thing. Either way, these earbuds work absolutely perfectly and I’m super happy with them!!

name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)
highlights: 2-in-1 Charging Case and Phone Stand: Enjoy hands-free viewing without the hassle. Simply open the back panel of the case, place your phone on the stand, and catch up on your favorite shows—watching while traveling has never been easier!

Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling: Reduce noise by up to 42dB with an advanced active noise cancelling system. With adaptive technology, soundocre P30i detects external sound and automatically selects a level of noise cancelling optimized for your ears.
Transparency Mode: Let in the world or focus on your audio, the choice is yours. Simply switch to transparency mode to hear the world around you when needed.
Powerful Bass: Unleash deep, punchy bass with soundcore P30i noise cancelling earbuds' 10mm drivers, amplified by the soundcore exclusive BassUp technology for an immersive, robust audio experience.

Long-Lasting Convenience: Enjoy up to 10 hours of playtime (6 hours with ANC) on a single charge, and up to 45 hours with the case (25 hours with ANC). A quick 10-minute charge provides 2 hours of use, perfect for your on-the-go lifestyle.
4-Mic AI Enhanced Calls: Experience clear calls anywhere you go with 4 microphones built into the wireless earbuds, alongside an AI algorithm that picks up your voice with precision.
One-Step Pairing: soundcore P30i uses the latest Bluetooth 5.4 for easy pairing, automatically connecting with the last paired device when taking the earbuds from the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound, strong battery life, and a lot of features for the price
reviews.body: I’m really impressed with these Soundcore P30i earbuds by Anker. The sound quality is very good for the price, especially the bass. Music, videos, and phone calls all sound clear, and the noise cancelling works better than I expected for earbuds in this price range.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
reviews.title: It’s the tricks, not the kicks
reviews.body: For pure sound quality, I recommend the Moondrop Space Travel TWS Earphone Bluetooth 5.3 Noise Canceling True Wireless Stereo IEMs(Black) over these. They are an off-brand, but popular, semi “in ear monitor” quality earbud. However, these Soundcore P30i are a lot easier to set up, change modes, an use, while not giving up much in terms of everyday music and video quality. Especially when watching tv and movies, you won’t likely notice any difference.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: The battery is unmatched!
reviews.body: These are fantastic little earbuds!! The sound quality is marvelous, I used them all the time at work or laying in bed watching a show on my iPad. I love that you’re able to seamlessly connect two devices at once, so I’m able to connect both my iPad and iPhone at the same time. You can’t play stuff simultaneously lets say you want to watch a video on your phone while you’re watching Netflix on the iPad, you can hit play and it’ll pause what you’re watching on your iPad and start playing the video on your phone! These earbuds are small and lightweight, they come with three different sizes to fit in your ear. I don’t use these often to make calls because I feel like they are slightly lacking in that aspect. Have too many instances of the other person not being able to hear me when I have them in. That said, I purchased these earbuds FOREVER ago, made sure they were fully charged and have not had a need to charge them yet! The battery life cannot be beat! They are definitely a great value. You get a fantastic, affordable pair of ear buds with an amazing battery light. Great buy!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: Excellent quality & sound, wish they had real buttons and volume control
reviews.body: I wish I could give 4.5 stars instead of just 4. I am a loyal Anker customer, and have had several Anker/Soundcore products over the years. I previously purchased the Soundcore by Anker Life A3i Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds, which I loved, but they had an issue that caused them to stop working before the warranty ran out and Anker replaced them for me with the Soundcore P30i - their customer service is exceptional and I highly recommend them! However, I *like* my new earbuds, but don’t *love* them.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound with a lot of bass (if desired) good microphone. Fantastic value.
reviews.body: Summary: I would definitely recommend. Great sound and a really good value.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on June 5, 2025
reviews.title: Shockingly satisfying in every possible way
reviews.body: After spending $1000 in headphones/earbuds in the last 3 years (1 Sony $390, 1 Samsung $350, 1 Google $199), and being disappointed with "cost/benefit" on all 3, I decided to give a shot at this absolutely inexpensive option.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026
reviews.title: They are so comfortable and fit very snug!
reviews.body: Finally found some ear buds that fit in my ear and actually stay! I have to say I love everything about these little guys, from the comfortable fit to the amazing sound and build qualities Ive known to expect from any Anker / Soundcore products! The noise cancelling works very well! I had the soundcore boom 2 streaming a movie next to me and i couldn't hear it! I havent experienced the battery life yet but I know its going to be good from who makes it. They know know how to make batteries! The case is small and easy to put places! Plus they have tons of colors to choose from and the price is amazing! I bought these as a secondary pair but they just became my daily driver so to speak!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
reviews.title: Decent backup earbuds for calls/meetings. Not awesome for music/noise cancelling
reviews.body: These earbuds work well enough for work meetings and phone calls which was the initial reason I purchased them, but they have issues when trying to use built-in noise cancelling or listening to music that fall short.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Australia on March 19, 2026
reviews.title: Fantastic Quality & Great Value
reviews.body: I bought these to replace Pixel Buds Pro and I'm astounded at the quality you get for the price. They connect quickly to the phone, have great noise cancelling and a decent microphone for calls. They fit comfortably and securely in my ear.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Egypt on March 27, 2026
reviews.title: انصح بها
reviews.body: خامه كويسه وصوتها جميل قيمه مقابل سعر

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on August 1, 2025
reviews.title: Great Deal
reviews.body: You won’t find wireless earbuds with this level of performance and features anywhere near this price. This brand punches way above its weight when it comes to delivering quality without the premium price tag.

reviews.date: Reviewed in India on March 4, 2026
reviews.title: Budget friendly and good quality product.
reviews.body: It is a good product with clear and good sound quality. Latency is satisfactory for the given price. I love it. It's battery life is very good and has fast charge. Definitely worth it. It had many modes of sound settings in the app plus we can customize it too. It is easier to use for daily day to day activities. Overall I had a great experience with soundcore r50i nc.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: Strongly recommended
reviews.body: It took me quite a while to choose a pair of reasonably priced earbuds that would actually work well for me. After a long search and reading many reviews I decided to try the Soundcore P30i by Anker and I’m genuinely glad I did.

reviews.body: You won’t find wireless earbuds with this level of performance and features anywhere near this price. This brand punches way above its weight when it comes to delivering quality without the premium price tag.

reviews.date: Reviewed in India on March 4, 2026
reviews.title: Budget friendly and good quality product.
reviews.body: It is a good product with clear and good sound quality. Latency is satisfactory for the given price. I love it. It's battery life is very good and has fast charge. Definitely worth it. It had many modes of sound settings in the app plus we can customize it too. It is easier to use for daily day to day activities. Overall I had a great experience with soundcore r50i nc.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: Strongly recommended
reviews.body: It took me quite a while to choose a pair of reasonably priced earbuds that would actually work well for me. After a long search and reading many reviews I decided to try the Soundcore P30i by Anker and I’m genuinely glad I did.

name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Pink)
highlights: 2-in-1 Charging Case and Phone Stand: Enjoy hands-free viewing without the hassle. Simply open the back panel of the case, place your phone on the stand, and catch up on your favorite shows—watching while traveling has never been easier!

Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling: Reduce noise by up to 42dB with an advanced active noise cancelling system. With adaptive technology, soundocre P30i detects external sound and automatically selects a level of noise cancelling optimized for your ears.
Transparency Mode: Let in the world or focus on your audio, the choice is yours. Simply switch to transparency mode to hear the world around you when needed.
Powerful Bass: Unleash deep, punchy bass with soundcore P30i noise cancelling earbuds' 10mm drivers, amplified by the soundcore exclusive BassUp technology for an immersive, robust audio experience.

Long-Lasting Convenience: Enjoy up to 10 hours of playtime (6 hours with ANC) on a single charge, and up to 45 hours with the case (25 hours with ANC). A quick 10-minute charge provides 2 hours of use, perfect for your on-the-go lifestyle.
4-Mic AI Enhanced Calls: Experience clear calls anywhere you go with 4 microphones built into the wireless earbuds, alongside an AI algorithm that picks up your voice with precision.
One-Step Pairing: soundcore P30i uses the latest Bluetooth 5.4 for easy pairing, automatically connecting with the last paired device when taking the earbuds from the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound, strong battery life, and a lot of features for the price
reviews.body: I’m really impressed with these Soundcore P30i earbuds by Anker. The sound quality is very good for the price, especially the bass. Music, videos, and phone calls all sound clear, and the noise cancelling works better than I expected for earbuds in this price range.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
reviews.title: It’s the tricks, not the kicks
reviews.body: For pure sound quality, I recommend the Moondrop Space Travel TWS Earphone Bluetooth 5.3 Noise Canceling True Wireless Stereo IEMs(Black) over these. They are an off-brand, but popular, semi “in ear monitor” quality earbud. However, these Soundcore P30i are a lot easier to set up, change modes, an use, while not giving up much in terms of everyday music and video quality. Especially when watching tv and movies, you won’t likely notice any difference.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: The battery is unmatched!
reviews.body: These are fantastic little earbuds!! The sound quality is marvelous, I used them all the time at work or laying in bed watching a show on my iPad. I love that you’re able to seamlessly connect two devices at once, so I’m able to connect both my iPad and iPhone at the same time. You can’t play stuff simultaneously lets say you want to watch a video on your phone while you’re watching Netflix on the iPad, you can hit play and it’ll pause what you’re watching on your iPad and start playing the video on your phone! These earbuds are small and lightweight, they come with three different sizes to fit in your ear. I don’t use these often to make calls because I feel like they are slightly lacking in that aspect. Have too many instances of the other person not being able to hear me when I have them in. That said, I purchased these earbuds FOREVER ago, made sure they were fully charged and have not had a need to charge them yet! The battery life cannot be beat! They are definitely a great value. You get a fantastic, affordable pair of ear buds with an amazing battery light. Great buy!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: Excellent quality & sound, wish they had real buttons and volume control
reviews.body: I wish I could give 4.5 stars instead of just 4. I am a loyal Anker customer, and have had several Anker/Soundcore products over the years. I previously purchased the Soundcore by Anker Life A3i Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds, which I loved, but they had an issue that caused them to stop working before the warranty ran out and Anker replaced them for me with the Soundcore P30i - their customer service is exceptional and I highly recommend them! However, I *like* my new earbuds, but don’t *love* them.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound with a lot of bass (if desired) good microphone. Fantastic value.
reviews.body: Summary: I would definitely recommend. Great sound and a really good value.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on June 5, 2025
reviews.title: Shockingly satisfying in every possible way
reviews.body: After spending $1000 in headphones/earbuds in the last 3 years (1 Sony $390, 1 Samsung $350, 1 Google $199), and being disappointed with "cost/benefit" on all 3, I decided to give a shot at this absolutely inexpensive option.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026
reviews.title: They are so comfortable and fit very snug!
reviews.body: Finally found some ear buds that fit in my ear and actually stay! I have to say I love everything about these little guys, from the comfortable fit to the amazing sound and build qualities Ive known to expect from any Anker / Soundcore products! The noise cancelling works very well! I had the soundcore boom 2 streaming a movie next to me and i couldn't hear it! I havent experienced the battery life yet but I know its going to be good from who makes it. They know know how to make batteries! The case is small and easy to put places! Plus they have tons of colors to choose from and the price is amazing! I bought these as a secondary pair but they just became my daily driver so to speak!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
reviews.title: Decent backup earbuds for calls/meetings. Not awesome for music/noise cancelling
reviews.body: These earbuds work well enough for work meetings and phone calls which was the initial reason I purchased them, but they have issues when trying to use built-in noise cancelling or listening to music that fall short.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Australia on March 19, 2026
reviews.title: Fantastic Quality & Great Value
reviews.body: I bought these to replace Pixel Buds Pro and I'm astounded at the quality you get for the price. They connect quickly to the phone, have great noise cancelling and a decent microphone for calls. They fit comfortably and securely in my ear.

In general, they have an excellent value for money and I recommend them for those looking for functional and economical wireless headphones.

Their in-ear design with a stem provides a comfortable and secure fit, making them suitable for everyday use at home, work, or during light activities.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 28, 2026
reviews.title: Modern sound and stable connection with Bluetooth 5.4 🎧

These headphones are an excellent choice if you are looking for comfort, good sound quality, and a reliable connection all in a single device.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Definitely worth the small investment!
reviews.body: Great sound quality for a $20 investment! Got a set for my 11 year old grandson because he likes to listen to things on his phone with an audience🙄 so if he loses them it isn’t a huge cost! I love mine, holds a charge for a good long time and case shows percentage of power at a glance.

reviews.date: Reviewed in France on October 15, 2023
reviews.title: Très bon écouteurs sans fils
reviews.body: Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Bon rapport qualité-prix. Bon son. Très bonne autonomie. Le Bluetooth se connecte très facilement autant a un iPhone qu’à un autre téléphone (exemple redmi), déjà testé avec ces téléphones la. Une fois que le Bluetooth est connecté, les écouteurs se connectent seul au téléphone. Seul bémol c’est qu’ils sont très sensibles et lorsqu’on les touche pour les remettre en place cela raccroche la communication téléphonique.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
reviews.title: Sehr gute Kopfhörer zu fairen Preis
reviews.body: Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Sweden on April 21, 2023
reviews.title: Riktigt bra hörlurar
reviews.body: Bland de bästa hörlurarna jag har testat. Riktigt bra ljud, bekväma och personer jag pratar med hör mig väldigt bra vilket är ovanligt för hörlurar i den här prisklassen. Batteritiden är också bra. Rekommenderas starkt!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Mexico on February 21, 2026
reviews.title: No recomendables
reviews.body: No me gustaron, son incómodos, se salen, con cualquier cosita (acomodarlos porque se salen, etc.) se pausa. No los recomiendo

reviews.title: Ottime
reviews.body: Per il prezzo pagato, ottime cuffie

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50H Playback, Deep Bass Stereo Ear Buds Clear Calls with LED Power Display, IPX7 Waterproof, in-Ear Earphones with Mic for Phone/Android/iPad, Ash Gray
highlights: 50 Hrs Playtime and Dual LED Display: Each earbud lasts up to 8 hours on a single charge, and up to 50 hours of playback with the charging case, giving you an exceptional long-lasting experience. In addition, the in-ear wireless Bluetooth headphones are equipped with a smart LED display that visually shows the power level

Bluetooth 5.4 and One Step Auto-Prairiing: The wireless earbuds utilize the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology for more stable transmission and longer range, providing you with an uninterrupted call and music experience. After the first pairing, simply remove both wireless earbuds from the charging case and they will pair automatically

Superior Sound Quality and Clear Calls: The S66 Bluetooth wireless headphone with 13.4 mm graphene diaphragm delivers powerful bass, clear mids and bright highs, and ear buds with dual hybrid ENC microphones passively eliminates 85% of background noise for clearer calls

Smart Touch and IP7 Waterproof: The smart touch control of the headphones can perfectly fulfill your daily needs and bring more convenience to your life.Meanwhile, Bluetooth earphones have IP7 waterproof rating to withstand sweat, rain and light splashes, making them suitable for wearing while exercising and running

Comfort Fit and Lightweight: The S66 Bluetooth headphone and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space. In addition, each in-ear earbud weighs only 4 grams, making it easy to wear for long periods of time

Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Sweden on April 21, 2023
reviews.title: Riktigt bra hörlurar
reviews.body: Bland de bästa hörlurarna jag har testat. Riktigt bra ljud, bekväma och personer jag pratar med hör mig väldigt bra vilket är ovanligt för hörlurar i den här prisklassen. Batteritiden är också bra. Rekommenderas starkt!

reviews.title: No recomendables
reviews.body: No me gustaron, son incómodos, se salen, con cualquier cosita (acomodarlos porque se salen, etc.) se pausa. No los recomiendo

reviews.title: Ottime
reviews.body: Per il prezzo pagato, ottime cuffie

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50H Playback, Deep Bass Stereo Ear Buds Clear Calls with LED Power Display, IPX7 Waterproof, in-Ear Earphones with Mic for Phone/Android/iPad, Black
highlights: 50 Hrs Playtime and Dual LED Display: Each earbud lasts up to 8 hours on a single charge, and up to 50 hours of playback with the charging case, giving you an exceptional long-lasting experience. In addition, the in-ear wireless Bluetooth headphones are equipped with a smart LED display that visually shows the power level

Bluetooth 5.4 and One Step Auto-Prairiing: The wireless earbuds utilize the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology for more stable transmission and longer range, providing you with an uninterrupted call and music experience. After the first pairing, simply remove both wireless earbuds from the charging case and they will pair automatically

Superior Sound Quality and Clear Calls: The S66 Bluetooth wireless headphone with 13.4 mm graphene diaphragm delivers powerful bass, clear mids and bright highs, and ear buds with dual hybrid ENC microphones passively eliminates 85% of background noise for clearer calls

Smart Touch and IP7 Waterproof: The smart touch control of the headphones can perfectly fulfill your daily needs and bring more convenience to your life.Meanwhile, Bluetooth earphones have IP7 waterproof rating to withstand sweat, rain and light splashes, making them suitable for wearing while exercising and running

Comfort Fit and Lightweight: The S66 Bluetooth headphone and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space. In addition, each in-ear earbud weighs only 4 grams, making it easy to wear for long periods of time

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Premium Sound & Style – A Must-Have! 🎧🔥
reviews.body: These wireless earbuds exceeded my expectations! Sleek design, comfortable fit, and the sound quality is crystal clear with great bass. The charging case is compact and super convenient, perfect for everyday use.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 1, 2026
reviews.title: Wireless Headphones, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50 Hours of Playback
reviews.body: I bought these True Wireless stereo earbuds taking their price point into consideration, and honestly, they have worked really well right from the very first use. The connectivity is easy and stable, and the sound quality is excellent for both listening to music and making calls. Furthermore, they are comfortable and secure, staying firmly in place even while you are on the move; plus, their noise cancellation is effective, reducing ambient sound to provide a superior listening experience. Additionally, the battery life is impressive, and the charging case is practical and easy to carry. All in all, they are highly recommended for daily use.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: Excelent headphones
reviews.body: I bought these headphones and I'm really satisfied with the purchase. The sound quality is very good for the price, they are heard clear and with good bass. In addition, they are comfortable to wear and fit well to the ear, so they don't fall off easily even when I'm on the move. The connection is fast and the battery lasts quite a long time. In general, they have an excellent value for money and I recommend them for those looking for functional and economical wireless headphones.

reviews.title: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50H Playback
reviews.body: They work great for the price and the sound quality.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
reviews.title: Auriculares
reviews.body: The S66 wireless earbuds are a practical and budget-friendly option for anyone looking to enjoy the convenience of a cable-free experience. Their in-ear design with a stem provides a comfortable and secure fit, making them suitable for everyday use at home, work, or during light activities.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 28, 2026
reviews.title: Modern sound and stable connection with Bluetooth 5.4 🎧
reviews.body: The sound quality is crisp, with deep bass and well-defined highs, making them perfect for both listening to music and making calls. Furthermore, their ergonomic design allows for hours of use without discomfort, fitting comfortably in the ear. These headphones are an excellent choice if you are looking for comfort, good sound quality, and a reliable connection all in a single device.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Definitely worth the small investment!
reviews.body: Great sound quality for a $20 investment! Got a set for my 11 year old grandson because he likes to listen to things on his phone with an audience🙄 so if he loses them it isn’t a huge cost! I love mine, holds a charge for a good long time and case shows percentage of power at a glance.

reviews.date: Reviewed in France on October 15, 2023
reviews.title: Très bon écouteurs sans fils
reviews.body: Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Bon rapport qualité-prix. Bon son. Très bonne autonomie. Le Bluetooth se connecte très facilement autant a un iPhone qu’à un autre téléphone (exemple redmi), déjà testé avec ces téléphones la. Une fois que le Bluetooth est connecté, les écouteurs se connectent seul au téléphone. Seul bémol c’est qu’ils sont très sensibles et lorsqu’on les touche pour les remettre en place cela raccroche la communication téléphonique.

highlights: 50 Hrs Playtime and Dual LED Display: Each earbud lasts up to 8 hours on a single charge, and up to 50 hours of playback with the charging case, giving you an exceptional long-lasting experience. In addition, the in-ear wireless Bluetooth headphones are equipped with a smart LED display that visually shows the power level

Bluetooth 5.4 and One Step Auto-Prairiing: The wireless earbuds utilize the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology for more stable transmission and longer range, providing you with an uninterrupted call and music experience. After the first pairing, simply remove both wireless earbuds from the charging case and they will pair automatically

Superior Sound Quality and Clear Calls: The S66 Bluetooth wireless headphone with 13.4 mm graphene diaphragm delivers powerful bass, clear mids and bright highs, and ear buds with dual hybrid ENC microphones passively eliminates 85% of background noise for clearer calls

Smart Touch and IP7 Waterproof: The smart touch control of the headphones can perfectly fulfill your daily needs and bring more convenience to your life.Meanwhile, Bluetooth earphones have IP7 waterproof rating to withstand sweat, rain and light splashes, making them suitable for wearing while exercising and running

Comfort Fit and Lightweight: The S66 Bluetooth headphone and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space. In addition, each in-ear earbud weighs only 4 grams, making it easy to wear for long periods of time
