reviews.date: Reviewed in France on October 15, 2023
reviews.title: Très bon écouteurs sans fils
reviews.body: Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Bon rapport qualité-prix. Bon son. Très bonne autonomie. Le Bluetooth se connecte très facilement autant a un iPhone qu’à un autre téléphone (exemple redmi), déjà testé avec ces téléphones la. Une fois que le Bluetooth est connecté, les écouteurs se connectent seul au téléphone. Seul bémol c’est qu’ils sont très sensibles et lorsqu’on les touche pour les remettre en place cela raccroche la communication téléphonique.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
reviews.title: Sehr gute Kopfhörer zu fairen Preis
reviews.body: Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Sweden on April 21, 2023

reviews.body: Bland de bästa hörlurarna jag har testat. Riktigt bra ljud, bekväma och personer jag pratar med hör mig väldigt bra vilket är ovanligt för hörlurar i den här prisklassen. Batteritiden är också bra. Rekommenderas starkt!

name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Black)
highlights: Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling: Advanced ANC reduces noise by up to 52 dB. Adaptive technology detects your surroundings and automatically chooses the best noise-cancelling level for you

Hi-Res Certified Sound with LDAC: Experience stunning, lossless Hi-Fi audio. Powered by LDAC, and Hi-Res Audio, these noise-cancelling earbuds reproduce musical nuances, delivering rich, well-balanced treble and bass.
Real-Time 100+ AI Translation: Communicate effortlessly in over 100 languages. AI instantly translates speech with high accuracy, keeping conversations smooth and natural.

6 AI-Enhanced Mics for Clear Calls: Six microphones work with an AI noise reduction algorithm to separate your voice from background noise. The wind-noise reduction algorithm keeps calls clear even outdoors.

Ultra-Long Playtime & Fast Charging: Enjoy up to 10 hours of playtime on a single charge (50 hours with the case). Even with ANC on, get 8 hours per charge and 40 hours total. A quick 10-minute charge gives 3.5 hours of listening.

reviews.body: WOW! It takes a lot these days for a purchase to genuinely blow me away, especially in the age of the countless low priced, questionable quality “audiophile grade” true wireless options out there. I have a pair on Sennheisser HD660s and Grado sr80s powered through a Fiios K5 Pro for at home listening. I needed something for the gym, being out and about, and most importantly travel.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 16, 2026
reviews.title: Good budget noise cancelling earbuds
reviews.body: I ordered this model after windows pushed an update that broke support for air pods hands free mic and teams call support after six months of use.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
reviews.title: Outstanding value
reviews.body: This should be considered a 4.5 review but I am amazed at the features and the overall quality of these earbuds. My beats fit pro finally fell apart and before I bought another pair I wanted to shop around Amazon and I remember Anker being always solid bang for the buck. Who would have thought earbuds under 50 bucks would sound better, more bass, better swear resistance rating, more built in app features including custom sound profiles based on your preferences. Yes there is a feature in the app where it plays a sound clip and based on your selection on which clip sounds better you get a custom sound profile tailored to it. The ANC is on par with my Beats Fit pro I mean do remember how much you are paying the bass is strong the mids and highs sound good. Like I said these sound and built better than they have a right to be at the price. The only feature that some lament is there is no in ear detection not an issue for me. The reason I am going to dock a .5 from nearly perfect earbuds is that there is some random and I mean very random times they disconnect its rare never had this issue with the beats I reset the connection but if I go into the steam room they want to drop. Not a huge deal as it's rare but still present. FYI I am using a OnePlus 13

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
reviews.title: Awesome sound, unbelievable battery life
reviews.body: I'm so particular about sound. I have a pair of wired earbuds that I bought more than a decade ago, and I've been trying to find a suitable Bluetooth replacement for years now because the wiring is going. I thought it would never happen until I found these! The sound is awesome. Deep bass, good midrange tones, and clear highs. They come with a variety of sizes of high-quality silicone tips, and once you get the size right it provides excellent sound isolation and increases the audio quality measurably. I had to use the XS tips and finnagle them a bit because my ear canals are quite small apparently. This does mean that if I am chewing or smiling a lot I have to adjust them frequently to keep them in the right place. On that note, one of the things I've hated in my search for Bluetooth earbuds is the tap controls which take any touch as a command to do something (change the volume, advance the track, turn the noise cancellation on or off). For someone who wants to adjust the way the earbuds sit in my ears frequently, touch controls are awful. These have an app in which you CAN DISABLE TOUCH CONTROLS! Hallelujah! Since I'm used to wired earbuds I always have my phone nearby so I control my music with my phone and don't miss touch controls at all. Also on the app you can adjust the equalizer to customize the sound to your preference. There is even a sound preference test that will create your ideal eq profile based on your series of choices comparing alternative sound designs. After my preference test the sound quality went from good to amazing! Battery life on these is also UNBELIEVABLE. I used them for multiple hours a day for about THREE WEEKS, and they were only down to 40% battery when I plugged them in to charge for the first time (I thought about seeing just how long I could go before needing to charge, but we were getting a winter storm and I didn't want to lose power and have low charge on my earbuds). The carrying case is small and convenient. I read someone complain in another review about how the finish on the carrying case makes it very slippery and I thought "what an odd thing to care about," but yeah, now I get it. The number of times I've nearly thrown this case across the room as it slips out of my hands is Mel Brooks-level comical. But hey, nothing is perfect and, as far as faults go, this is an easy one to overlook. The noise cancellation is also very good. I've never used noise cancellation much because the majority of the time I'm using headphones I'm just sitting in my house, and some other headphones I've had inject an obvious and annoying static sound when the noise cancellation is on. As said above I'm all about sound quality so that's no good. But these, I played with the noise cancellation like having the TV on in the background while listening and it does a great job! The TV sound disappeared almost completely and there was only very minor static sound as a tradeoff. Apparently these also can do real-time language translation which is pretty cool, but I havent had occasion to try it out yet. All in all these are SO AWESOME and CONVENIENT that I'm listening to tons more music. Love them love them love them, cannot recommend more highly.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026
reviews.title: Better than my Air Pods or Beats buds
reviews.body: Everything has to be evaluated by price, quality, performance, and durability. I'm a musician and audio nerd. Soundcore is making ridiculously good quality audio gear for 1/4 of the price, and I don't know how they're doing it. I have these earbuds and the Boom 2 Bluetooth speaker, and both of them are crisp, have great audio nuance, and the app has great options for sound profiles. Sure, the Air Pods and the Beats are a bit more hefty (durable), but Air Pod sound is overly crisp (almost too manipulated), and Bears are very underwhelming to me (made mostly for that scooped Hip Hop audio experience). I like mids in my listening experience. I like to hear that 3rd guitar track way in the background, or that occasionally syncopated tap on an old drum break bell. For me bass needs to clear, highs need to be crisp without getting into your skull with that ultra crisp dog whistle buzz some equipment produces, and mids need to be present and bring an immersed experience. These buds do all of that, especially with the EQ options in the app. So far I like flat, Acoustic for a mid and low bump, or Electronic for a small variant of the Acoustic EQ. I'll make some custom EQs for myself eventually too.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 24, 2026
reviews.title: Affordable and quality!
reviews.body: Sound quality is amazing, the noise cancelling is great, and they are comfortable to wear. I’ve never had them die on me (although I do charge them often). Overall, great quality for the price!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Brazil on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: Fone excelente!! Com ótimo custo-benefício.
reviews.body: A experiência de áudio em músicas, filmes e jogos (neste ressalta as passadas e os tiros, além da direção deles, em jogo de FPS) é excelente com ótimo custo-benefício, ativei o LDAC e defini a maior taxa de banda de áudio nas opções de desenvolvedor do celular, além de ativar no App Soundcore. Só não gostei porque, diferente do P41i, quando ativa para jogos perde a conexão dupla, podendo conectar em 1 dispositivo apenas. A redução de ruído é maior que no P41i, além de ter opção de história pra dormir (em inglês) e mais opções de ruído branco... Não calculei o tempo médio que demora uma carga, mas já passei um dia inteiro e à noite às vezes no ouvido sem carregar e sem sentir desconforto no encaixe da orelha também. Estou muito, mas muito, satisfeito com esse fone. Super recomendo!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Mexico on February 23, 2026
reviews.title: Son una buena elección
reviews.body: Tiene buen sonido relacionado precio- calidad, la cancelación de sonido es un 90% efectiva (aún no la he probado en exteriores), la batería también es buena al menos aguanta mi horario de 8hrs en oficina, son cómodos, la IA de traducción es un plus muy bueno y la app en general es bastante amigable… Llevo usándolo cerca de una semana y media y me están gustando mucho.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the Netherlands on March 2, 2026
reviews.title: Helemaal prima
reviews.body: Perfecte prijs-kwaliteit! ANC prima, bediening prima. Zoek je een betaalbare en goede set, dan is dit je keus.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Brazil on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: Fone excelente!! Com ótimo custo-benefício.
reviews.body: A experiência de áudio em músicas, filmes e jogos (neste ressalta as passadas e os tiros, além da direção deles, em jogo de FPS) é excelente com ótimo custo-benefício, ativei o LDAC e defini a maior taxa de banda de áudio nas opções de desenvolvedor do celular, além de ativar no App Soundcore. Só não gostei porque, diferente do P41i, quando ativa para jogos perde a conexão dupla, podendo conectar em 1 dispositivo apenas. A redução de ruído é maior que no P41i, além de ter opção de história pra dormir (em inglês) e mais opções de ruído branco... Não calculei o tempo médio que demora uma carga, mas já passei um dia inteiro e à noite às vezes no ouvido sem carregar e sem sentir desconforto no encaixe da orelha também. Estou muito, mas muito, satisfeito com esse fone. Super recomendo!!

name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Pink)
highlights: Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling: Advanced ANC reduces noise by up to 52 dB. Adaptive technology detects your surroundings and automatically chooses the best noise-cancelling level for you

Hi-Res Certified Sound with LDAC: Experience stunning, lossless Hi-Fi audio. Powered by LDAC, and Hi-Res Audio, these noise-cancelling earbuds reproduce musical nuances, delivering rich, well-balanced treble and bass.
Real-Time 100+ AI Translation: Communicate effortlessly in over 100 languages. AI instantly translates speech with high accuracy, keeping conversations smooth and natural.

6 AI-Enhanced Mics for Clear Calls: Six microphones work with an AI noise reduction algorithm to separate your voice from background noise. The wind-noise reduction algorithm keeps calls clear even outdoors.

Ultra-Long Playtime & Fast Charging: Enjoy up to 10 hours of playtime on a single charge (50 hours with the case). Even with ANC on, get 8 hours per charge and 40 hours total. A quick 10-minute charge gives 3.5 hours of listening.

reviews.title: Excellent earbuds excellent connectivity excellent sound quality good price. good to go!
reviews.body: Revised review: Man I have to come back and fix this. The connectivity is excellent The battery life is unbelievably good. I withdraw any previous criticisms when I was extremely stressed out and doing three things at the same time very busy with a lot of things and I hadn't done everything I was supposed to do while setting it up which only takes actually just a little bit. Download the app integrate it Make sure the firmware is updated on your first use takes just a couple of minutes and they have excellent sound quality the base is deep The microphone capability sounds great I use it while gaming it connects to my switch 2 it is a dream. When I put them back in the case they disconnect and when you put them back in they automatically fire right up. You don't even have to go back and forth to the app but I do because all of the sound options like transparent mode sound filtering and the noise cancellation is great I've never had it ear pair of earbuds that's done this but the technology is quite astonishing. Very happy with this and I apologize and withdrawal my previous criticism as I hadn't fully set it up yet so that's on me.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
reviews.title: Excellent sound quality at a price/performance that can't be beat
reviews.body: Let me start by saying I've used a large number of different headphones, of different styles including over the ear, on ear and ear buds, from Bose, Beats, Sony, Apple and a number of lesser known brands. This review is being made after only having this set a few days, so it is an initial opinion.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 9, 2025
reviews.title: Best Audio Purchase I Have Made in Years! AirPods Killers. Outstanding buds
reviews.body: WOW! It takes a lot these days for a purchase to genuinely blow me away, especially in the age of the countless low priced, questionable quality “audiophile grade” true wireless options out there. I have a pair on Sennheisser HD660s and Grado sr80s powered through a Fiios K5 Pro for at home listening. I needed something for the gym, being out and about, and most importantly travel.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 16, 2026
reviews.title: Good budget noise cancelling earbuds
reviews.body: I ordered this model after windows pushed an update that broke support for air pods hands free mic and teams call support after six months of use.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
reviews.title: Outstanding value
reviews.body: This should be considered a 4.5 review but I am amazed at the features and the overall quality of these earbuds. My beats fit pro finally fell apart and before I bought another pair I wanted to shop around Amazon and I remember Anker being always solid bang for the buck. Who would have thought earbuds under 50 bucks would sound better, more bass, better swear resistance rating, more built in app features including custom sound profiles based on your preferences. Yes there is a feature in the app where it plays a sound clip and based on your selection on which clip sounds better you get a custom sound profile tailored to it. The ANC is on par with my Beats Fit pro I mean do remember how much you are paying the bass is strong the mids and highs sound good. Like I said these sound and built better than they have a right to be at the price. The only feature that some lament is there is no in ear detection not an issue for me. The reason I am going to dock a .5 from nearly perfect earbuds is that there is some random and I mean very random times they disconnect its rare never had this issue with the beats I reset the connection but if I go into the steam room they want to drop. Not a huge deal as it's rare but still present. FYI I am using a OnePlus 13

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
reviews.title: Awesome sound, unbelievable battery life
reviews.body: I'm so particular about sound. I have a pair of wired earbuds that I bought more than a decade ago, and I've been trying to find a suitable Bluetooth replacement for years now because the wiring is going. I thought it would never happen until I found these! The sound is awesome. Deep bass, good midrange tones, and clear highs. They come with a variety of sizes of high-quality silicone tips, and once you get the size right it provides excellent sound isolation and increases the audio quality measurably. I had to use the XS tips and finnagle them a bit because my ear canals are quite small apparently. This does mean that if I am chewing or smiling a lot I have to adjust them frequently to keep them in the right place. On that note, one of the things I've hated in my search for Bluetooth earbuds is the tap controls which take any touch as a command to do something (change the volume, advance the track, turn the noise cancellation on or off). For someone who wants to adjust the way the earbuds sit in my ears frequently, touch controls are awful. These have an app in which you CAN DISABLE TOUCH CONTROLS! Hallelujah! Since I'm used to wired earbuds I always have my phone nearby so I control my music with my phone and don't miss touch controls at all. Also on the app you can adjust the equalizer to customize the sound to your preference. There is even a sound preference test that will create your ideal eq profile based on your series of choices comparing alternative sound designs. After my preference test the sound quality went from good to amazing! Battery life on these is also UNBELIEVABLE. I used them for multiple hours a day for about THREE WEEKS, and they were only down to 40% battery when I plugged them in to charge for the first time (I thought about seeing just how long I could go before needing to charge, but we were getting a winter storm and I didn't want to lose power and have low charge on my earbuds). The carrying case is small and convenient. I read someone complain in another review about how the finish on the carrying case makes it very slippery and I thought "what an odd thing to care about," but yeah, now I get it. The number of times I've nearly thrown this case across the room as it slips out of my hands is Mel Brooks-level comical. But hey, nothing is perfect and, as far as faults go, this is an easy one to overlook. The noise cancellation is also very good. I've never used noise cancellation much because the majority of the time I'm using headphones I'm just sitting in my house, and some other headphones I've had inject an obvious and annoying static sound when the noise cancellation is on. As said above I'm all about sound quality so that's no good. But these, I played with the noise cancellation like having the TV on in the background while listening and it does a great job! The TV sound disappeared almost completely and there was only very minor static sound as a tradeoff. Apparently these also can do real-time language translation which is pretty cool, but I havent had occasion to try it out yet. All in all these are SO AWESOME and CONVENIENT that I'm listening to tons more music. Love them love them love them, cannot recommend more highly.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026
reviews.title: Better than my Air Pods or Beats buds
reviews.body: Everything has to be evaluated by price, quality, performance, and durability. I'm a musician and audio nerd. Soundcore is making ridiculously good quality audio gear for 1/4 of the price, and I don't know how they're doing it. I have these earbuds and the Boom 2 Bluetooth speaker, and both of them are crisp, have great audio nuance, and the app has great options for sound profiles. Sure, the Air Pods and the Beats are a bit more hefty (durable), but Air Pod sound is overly crisp (almost too manipulated), and Bears are very underwhelming to me (made mostly for that scooped Hip Hop audio experience). I like mids in my listening experience. I like to hear that 3rd guitar track way in the background, or that occasionally syncopated tap on an old drum break bell. For me bass needs to clear, highs need to be crisp without getting into your skull with that ultra crisp dog whistle buzz some equipment produces, and mids need to be present and bring an immersed experience. These buds do all of that, especially with the EQ options in the app. So far I like flat, Acoustic for a mid and low bump, or Electronic for a small variant of the Acoustic EQ. I'll make some custom EQs for myself eventually too.

name: JBL Tune Buds - True wireless Noise Cancelling earbuds, JBL Pure Bass Sound, Bluetooth 5.3, 4-Mic technology for Crisp, Clear Calls, Up to 48 hours of battery life, Water and dust resistant (Black)
description:
Product Description
Tackle your day one song at a time with the JBL Tune Buds. These true wireless earbuds give you up to 48 hours of exceptional JBL Pure Bass Sound, while the ergonomic, water and dust resistant design gives you all-day comfort in any weather. A simple touch allows you to manage and enjoy perfect calls anywhere, without ambient noises. And with Active Noise Cancelling and Smart Ambient technology, you choose whether you want to tune out the world or engage with your surroundings. The bud design ensures perfect isolation from outside noises and secure fit. Best of all, the JBL Headphones App lets you personalize your entire listening experience. Stay connected to your world, your way.
highlights: JBL Pure Bass Sound: Smartly designed 10mm drivers enhanced by the buds' form factor deliver JBL's Pure Bass Sound so you'll feel every pulsing beat.

Bluetooth 5.3 with LE audio support (): Thanks to the next generation Bluetooth technology, the JBL Tune Buds earbuds stream audio with low power consumption at high quality. Plus, BT 5.3 allows to stream synchronized audio independently to each earbud, so that you can use either or both earbuds. Or you can share your video or music content with a friend wearing headphones, as BT 5.3 lets you seamlessly stream audio to multiple listeners. () Available via OTA update at a later stage

Active Noise Cancelling with Smart Ambient: Hear more of what you want, less of what you don't. Active Noise Cancelling technology lets you minimize audio distractions. With Ambient Aware, you can tune into your surroundings at any time so that you feel safer when you're out in the world, while TalkThru lets you stop for a quick chat without having to remove your headphones.

4-Mic technology for Crisp, Clear Calls: Enjoy hassle-free, hands-free calls in stereo. The Tune Buds are equipped with dual microphones, so you'll always be heard with perfect clarity. Never hesitate to take or make a call again. And with VoiceAware, you can choose how much of your own voice to hear by controlling the amount of mic input routed back into your earbuds.

Up to 48 hours of battery life: Never miss a beat with 48 (12 plus36) hours of battery life or 10 hours, plus 30 hours in the case when noise cancelling is engaged. Need a boost Speed Charge for just 15 minutes to get 4 hours of playtime.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on September 18, 2025
reviews.title: Sound like $200 plus, no regrets here!
reviews.body: Very comfortable, decent noise cancelling, both ear bud & case batteries last better than my last pair of Sony earbuds. I do not have excellent ears, age, heredity, and industrial noise have seen to that, so the highs are probably wasted on me, but I have enjoyed the excellent image these buds create; I have a favorite recording of Handel's "Messiah", and it's easy to "see" where each soloist and group of singers, along with the parts of the orchestra are arranged, like you would at a live performance. As one group sings, then another one comes in you can hear the source coming from another area. The earbuds do work themselves out from time to time, but give warning & are easy to reposition. My last pair was the best Sony model, which I lost one of. I didn't want to drop another $250 , so I bought these. Now I never will. Tremendous value, with no indication of being cheap. One tiny issue: when dropped from waist high or higher onto a hard surface , the case invariably pops open and ejects both earbuds several feet. My fault, of course, but just saying. 10 month update: quality continues; sound is excellent & both earbud and holder batteries continue to last and last.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026
reviews.title: Great buds that I will keep coming back for
reviews.body: When I lost my last pair, I immediately ordered it again, these are the best in my opinion. The sound quality and battery life are great for the price and for my needs, and it charges quickly. I had to upgrade to these after the previous generation of BT kept losing connection. These stay connected perfectly. My own suggestion is DO NOT but it used. The ones I bought before this one were used because I was in a tight spot, and it said "like new", so what could go wrong, right? Yeah, I took it out of the package and one of the buds was caked with old dried earwax. I cleaned it as best I could and used it for a week. It kept dropping the connection which was of course a deal breaker for me, so I ended up buying the next pair NEW on my next paycheck. Now I'm back to the same great experience that made me purchase it in the first place.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 22, 2025
reviews.title: Great earbuds
reviews.body: These earbuds sound awesome! The features are great! They are a bit bulky and it took me awhile to get them to fit and I was actually wearing them wrong to begin with, you’re supposed to put them in your ear and then turn them to the left to screw them into your ears and after I did that they fit so much better. The touch controls work great and I like how you can adjust the controls for your own liking on the app. I use these at work and I can hear everything going on around me as well as what I’m listening to with the ambient aware which is amazing to me. Definitely a lot of features for the money and the battery actually last about 10 hours! I have these connected to my iPhone 17 and they connect fast every time and Siri works just fine as well. The only con is that they are a bit bulky and I do have to adjust them at times but not a big deal to me.

Just trying to get through an airport with them in was a nightmare.

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Sport, Over Ear Buds With ENC Noise Cancelling Mic, 48H, Wireless Earphone With Earhooks, Stereo Deep Bass, IP7 Waterproof Headset for Workout, Black
highlights: Next-Gen Bluetooth 5.4: The earbuds wireless bluetooth uses the latest Bluetooth 5.4 chipset, which increases the connection speed by 80%, twice the speed of the previous generation chip. The wireless earphones adopts an enhanced low-latency design, with an audio transmission delay of only 40 milliseconds, ensuring seamless connection within a range of 15 meters, allowing you to experience lossless sound quality without interruption.

Clear Sound Quality, Smooth Calls: The running earbuds are equipped with a large 14.2mm built-in driver, a high-resolution decoder and a unique three-layer composite diaphragm design, which enhances the bass by 43% to prevent sound distortion and bring you vivid and detailed sound quality. During use, the noise cancelling earbuds are supported by four ENC microphones to eliminate 80% of background noise, ensuring clear calls even in noisy environments such as traffic, gym or office.

Comfortable To Wear, IP7 Waterproof: With flexible and soft ear hooks design, the sport earbuds fit your ears perfectly, allowing you to keep wearing comfortably even during intense exercise without worrying about falling off. In addition, this bluetooth earbuds can also resist the invasion of sweat and rain, making it an ideal choice for sports, workout, running, exercise and other activities

Get Rid Of Battery Anxiety: The total playback time of over the ear earbuds is up to 48 hours. After a single charge, each earbuds with ear hooks can be used for up to 8 hours at 50% volume. You can do 2 hours of workout without stopping the music. Besides the charging case can provide 4-5 additional charges for your workout earbuds.

Lightning Fast Charging: Thanks to the USB-C fast charging technology of this wireless headphone, you can immerse yourself in your favorite music again in the blink of an eye, and the dual LED display on the charging case adds a touch of modern and technological feel to the entire charging process.

Smart Touch Control & High Compatibility: The wireless ear buds are designed with advanced smart chips, supporting binaural touch control, with 22.5% higher accuracy. This reduces false touches, response delays, and button failures, allowing you to fully control your audio during exercise or activities without interruption, and easily control music or calls without operating your phone. This bluetooth earphones is compatible with most Bluetooth devices, including smartphones, tablets, laptops, and more.

reviews.body: I’m honestly so impressed with these earbuds! The first thing that caught my eye was the design they’re super sleek and unique compared to typical earbuds. The over-ear hook makes them feel really secure, so they don’t slip out even when I’m moving around a lot.

reviews.body: I really like these headphones since I can run or exercise and because of their grip on my ear they don't fall off, they are very comfortable and don't hurt they work very well the audio is clear and the volume is very good, to make calls it connects very well and the battery lasts a long time I recommend them

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026
reviews.title: Very good quality!!
reviews.body: They are comfortable, and don't slip much when you're active and moving around like some other over-ear headphones I've had. The sound itself, I found, is actually their best quality. They handle bass impressively well and the sound itself is dynamic and full. The battery is actually pretty decent as well. They charge fast and last a good while before needing to do so again. When worn, I was not able to hear most background/environment sounds; so they do have a passive noise-cancellation when you have them on. I do find that they are also greatly responsive. No matter how lightly I tap the interface, they always recognize the interaction for the different functions (pausing, changing volume, etc.) available without me having to try it 2 and 3 different times. Overall, I do enjoy the functionality and performance. I highly recommend!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 21, 2026
reviews.title: So far, so good
reviews.body: So far I am enjoying these ear buds. They have a good sound and I hardly know I am wearing them. Nice long charge. I sometimes sleep with ear buds for sleep meditations like falling rain, and they stay on with the soft clips. Comfortable during sleep. The fit is decent enough yet I had to switch to the large tips. It helps, but it still doesn’t seat properly up against my ears and create gaps especially outside allowing interfering noise to get in. What they need are extensions to push the tip firmly against the ear. The clips are fixed so it pulls it away from my ear. Otherwise 5 stars. Will come back later to update.

name: Apple AirPods 4 Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, with Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive, Transparency Mode, Personalized Spatial Audio, USB-C Charging Case, Wireless Charging, H2 Chip
highlights: REBUILT FOR COMFORT — AirPods 4 have been redesigned for exceptional all-day comfort and greater stability. With a refined contour, shorter stem, and quick-press controls for music or calls.
ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION — AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation help reduce outside noise before it reaches your ears, so you can immerse yourself in what you’re listening to.*

HEAR THE WORLD AROUND YOU — The powerful H2 chip comes to AirPods 4. Adaptive Audio seamlessly blends ANC and Transparency mode — which lets you comfortably hear and interact with the world around you exactly as it sounds — to provide the best listening experience in any environment.* And when you’re speaking with someone nearby, Conversation Awareness automatically lowers the volume of what’s playing.*

IMPROVED SOUND AND CALL QUALITY — Voice Isolation improves the quality of calls in loud conditions. Using advanced computational audio, it reduces background noise while isolating and clarifying the sound of your voice for whomever you’re speaking to.*

MAGICAL EXPERIENCE — Just say “Siri” or “Hey Siri” to play a song, make a call, or check your schedule.* And with Siri Interactions, now you can respond to Siri by simply nodding your head yes or shaking your head no.* Pair AirPods 4 by simply placing them near your device and tapping Connect on your screen.* Easily share a song or show between two sets of AirPods.* An optical in-ear sensor knows to play audio only when you’re wearing AirPods and pauses when you take them off. And you can track down your AirPods and Charging Case with the Find My app.*

PERSONALIZED SPATIAL AUDIO — Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you, creating a theater-like listening experience for music, TV shows, movies, games, and more.*
REDESIGNED CASE — The Charging Case is the smallest in the industry with wireless charging. Charge with an Apple Watch Charger, USB-C Charge Cable, or Qi-certified charger.*

reviews.body: These AirPods are my absolute favorite. I love these because unlike some Pro models, they don't come with foam or rubber earpieces which to me, are not very comfortable. These AirPods fit perfectly, fully compatible with all Apple devices, quality and durability is what one expects from Apple. Audio quality and features such as noise cancellation and adaptive audio are second to none. I also love the wireless charging case with speaker, so when I put it on a wireless charger, I get a chime telling me it's charging. Also in the latest released of all OS's, my devices tell me when the AirPods are fully charged. I'm very happy with these AirPods.
reviews.variant: Style: With Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 2, 2026
reviews.title: Absolutely amazing noise cancellation!
reviews.body: My original AirPods were from pre-2020 I think? They were still working technically, but they weren’t really holding a charge anymore and I had replaced the charging unit back in 2021, so it felt like instead of replacing that again maybe it was best to just get a new pair. I can’t even express how IMPRESSED I was with the noise cancellation! It’s honestly amazing coming from someone who has not had noise canceling headphones. The adaptive learning feature is also so cool - there’s several features but I like the one that listen to hear if there’s a conversation going and then it lowers the audio you’re listening to. There’s also a spacial awareness type one to hear what’s going on around you, like you would without noise cancellation. But it’s the noise cancellation that’s the real star of the show. When I was on a plane and I put these in my ears without even listening to anything audio wise, it numbed the sound of the plane so much and made it so quiet it was amazing. They’re small, and light in weight. The quality is just amazing - Apple does it again! They connected with my iPhone Pro 16 so well, instantly. I really can’t say enough positive things they’re worth every dollar.

Comfortable Design and IP7 Waterproof: The pocket-sized charging case takes up minimal space, and the ergonomic design of the sport ear buds ensures pressure-free wear. The Wireless headphones bluetooth with an arc-shaped structure, offering a comfortable fit that stays secure during activities like running and workouts. Smart Touch Control and Wide Compatibility: Features with touch control sensors, earphones wireless bluetooth allows you to conveniently power on/off, play/pause, skip songs, answer/hang up, adjust volume, activate Siri and access other functions at the touch of a button. Ergonomic Wireless Earbuds for All-Day Wear: 3-size medical-grade gel tips (S/M/L) conform to 99% ear contours, including small ear canals. Ultra-compact charging case (0.09lbs) 40% smaller than most headphones on the market, designed for fitness armbands and pocket storage.

name: Raycon Everyday Classic Bluetooth Wireless Earbuds + Microphone with Active Noise Canceling, Sweat & Water-Resistant Earphones, Ear Buds Wireless Bluetooth Up to 32 Hours Playtime (Black)
highlights: 🔇 ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION | Enjoy immersive sound with these noise cancelling earbuds designed to reduce distractions at home, work, or on the go. Whether you’re listening to music, taking calls, or gaming, these wireless earbuds deliver focused, high-quality audio in a compact design.
👂 COMFORTABLE IN-EAR DESIGN | Designed as in-ear ear buds, offering a lightweight, secure fit that’s easy to wear all day. Multiple ear tip sizes help ensure comfort during work, travel, or workouts.

📱 WIRELESS BLUETOOTH COMPATIBILITY | These earbuds wireless bluetooth pair seamlessly with iOS and Android devices, making them ideal wireless earbuds for iPhone as well as ear buds for Android phones. Enjoy smooth connectivity with bluetooth earbuds, earphones wireless bluetooth, and reliable everyday performance.

🏃‍♂️ VERSATILE USE FOR WORK, TRAVEL & GAMING | Up to 32 hours of battery life, 8 hour playtime without the case + 24 extra hours with the case. From calls and podcasts to music and mobile gaming earbuds, these wireless ear buds noise cancelling adapt to any lifestyle. Use them as everyday earphones, compact ear pods for iPhone, or portable audio for commuting and travel.
💦 IPX4 SWEAT & WATER-RESISTANT | Built to move with you, these ear buds are ideal for workouts, running, and outdoor activities.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 18, 2026
reviews.title: I had high hopes, maybe I just got a dud pair. Raycon made it right!
reviews.body: Edit/update! 1/29/2026. Raycon contacted me and offered a full refund! Either someone actually reads the comments or it's AI, either way, I was shocked! I am really glad that they reached out and offered a refund. I will keep my hopes up that they look into the issues and maybe update the contact method. I really wanted to believe that I got a dud pair and now I am more convinced that it is what happened. I am changing the 2 star to 5, if anyone cares, haha. There is room for improvement. However, with their response to the issue, and the sound quality and price previously mentioned, I am pleased. Seems like they genuinely want to satisfy the consumer. Thank you Raycon!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: No ear fatigue. Highly recommended

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: Awesome!
reviews.body: I have this amazing ability to lose earbuds. I also have this belief that the more you spend the better the bud.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 13, 2026
reviews.title: Solid would recommend
reviews.body: Very comfortable. Snug fit in ear enhances noise cancellation sound. Toggling between sound settings is simple push of a button. Sound is raw but deep enough for great musical sound for the price range. Unfortunately no integrated app for battery status or performance adjustments/updates or settings changes ect…

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Good sound and long hours
reviews.body: The earbuds are very nice, but I feel like my left ear bud is not working

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound and sleek design.
reviews.body: I’m really happy with these black Bluetooth wireless earbuds. They have a clean, modern look and feel very comfortable even after wearing them for a while. The sound quality is impressive clear vocals, solid bass, and no noticeable lag when watching videos.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 23, 2022
reviews.title: Solid "B" grade. 3.5 stars, Music sounds great, phone works great, awareness mode needs help.
reviews.body: I got the E25's, black. Packaging is nice, comes with a brief, clearly written user manual which I used right away to see how to change the sound options. I use a Samsung Galaxy S20 FE 5G, and I took these buds out of the package, directly out of the case and put them right in. The default female voice told me they were powered on right away, sounding in both ears, in the order i put them in. Opened bluetooth options on my phone and they were already listed as "Raycon Everyday Buds." I touched the name and they connected right off without any issue whatsoever. Hit play on my music, and I love the sound. I just opened them today, so I'm waiting to see how these endure before giving full stars.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026
reviews.title: Afforadable, but short lifespan
reviews.body: Picked these up in November 2025, and they were a great pair of earbuds till March 2026.

reviews.date: Reviewed in India on December 8, 2023
reviews.title: Not good at all
reviews.body: I've bought raycon product for 1st time after seeing the mix reviews and i regret it.buds was desync when I recieved it and don't get fixed after factory reset but Amazon customer service is so helpful that's why I'm giving them 2 star

reviews.date: Reviewed in France on May 21, 2024
reviews.title: TB
reviews.body: Bon qualité de son, facile d'utilisation, bon rapport/qualité prix

reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on August 10, 2023
reviews.title: klein und gut
reviews.body: Die Buds kommen mit Ladekapsel (erstaunlich klein), Ladekabel und 4 verschiedene Geltips, sodass sie auch bei kleinem Gehörgang gut sitzen und weder herausfallen noch drücken oder unangenehm sind. Für guten Sound sorgen 3 verschiedene Soundmodi. Auf der Raycon-Seite sind die Buds übrigens deutlich günstiger!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Italy on June 9, 2025
reviews.title: Resistenti ma costosi
reviews.body: Cambiati oggi dopo 2 anni, mi hanno accompagnato in tantissime avventure.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Brazil on January 25, 2023
reviews.title: Excelente escolha!!!
reviews.body: Gostei muito do fone... pesquisei sobre vários fones na mesma faixa de preço!!! Sem dúvidas fiz uma boa escolha!!!

name: Raycon Everyday Classic Bluetooth Wireless Earbuds + Microphone with Active Noise Canceling, Sweat & Water-Resistant Earphones, Ear Buds Wireless Bluetooth Up to 32 Hours Playtime (Mint)
highlights: 🔇 ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION | Enjoy immersive sound with these noise cancelling earbuds designed to reduce distractions at home, work, or on the go. Whether you’re listening to music, taking calls, or gaming, these wireless earbuds deliver focused, high-quality audio in a compact design.
👂 COMFORTABLE IN-EAR DESIGN | Designed as in-ear ear buds, offering a lightweight, secure fit that’s easy to wear all day. Multiple ear tip sizes help ensure comfort during work, travel, or workouts.

📱 WIRELESS BLUETOOTH COMPATIBILITY | These earbuds wireless bluetooth pair seamlessly with iOS and Android devices, making them ideal wireless earbuds for iPhone as well as ear buds for Android phones. Enjoy smooth connectivity with bluetooth earbuds, earphones wireless bluetooth, and reliable everyday performance.

🏃‍♂️ VERSATILE USE FOR WORK, TRAVEL & GAMING | Up to 32 hours of battery life, 8 hour playtime without the case + 24 extra hours with the case. From calls and podcasts to music and mobile gaming earbuds, these wireless ear buds noise cancelling adapt to any lifestyle. Use them as everyday earphones, compact ear pods for iPhone, or portable audio for commuting and travel.
💦 IPX4 SWEAT & WATER-RESISTANT | Built to move with you, these ear buds are ideal for workouts, running headphones, and outdoor activities.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 18, 2026
reviews.title: I had high hopes, maybe I just got a dud pair. Raycon made it right!
reviews.body: Edit/update! 1/29/2026. Raycon contacted me and offered a full refund! Either someone actually reads the comments or it's AI, either way, I was shocked! I am really glad that they reached out and offered a refund. I will keep my hopes up that they look into the issues and maybe update the contact method. I really wanted to believe that I got a dud pair and now I am more convinced that it is what happened. I am changing the 2 star to 5, if anyone cares, haha. There is room for improvement. However, with their response to the issue, and the sound quality and price previously mentioned, I am pleased. Seems like they genuinely want to satisfy the consumer. Thank you Raycon!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 13, 2026
reviews.title: Solid would recommend
reviews.body: Very comfortable. Snug fit in ear enhances noise cancellation sound. Toggling between sound settings is simple push of a button. Sound is raw but deep enough for great musical sound for the price range. Unfortunately no integrated app for battery status or performance adjustments/updates or settings changes ect…

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Good sound and long hours
reviews.body: The earbuds are very nice, but I feel like my left ear bud is not working

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Great sound and sleek design.
reviews.body: I’m really happy with these black Bluetooth wireless earbuds. They have a clean, modern look and feel very comfortable even after wearing them for a while. The sound quality is impressive clear vocals, solid bass, and no noticeable lag when watching videos.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 23, 2022
reviews.title: Solid "B" grade. 3.5 stars, Music sounds great, phone works great, awareness mode needs help.
reviews.body: I got the E25's, black. Packaging is nice, comes with a brief, clearly written user manual which I used right away to see how to change the sound options. I use a Samsung Galaxy S20 FE 5G, and I took these buds out of the package, directly out of the case and put them right in. The default female voice told me they were powered on right away, sounding in both ears, in the order i put them in. Opened bluetooth options on my phone and they were already listed as "Raycon Everyday Buds." I touched the name and they connected right off without any issue whatsoever. Hit play on my music, and I love the sound. I just opened them today, so I'm waiting to see how these endure before giving full stars.

name: Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones 80H Playtime Ear Buds with Power Display Case Hi-Res Sound & Clear Calls Over Ear Hooks Earphones for Sports Running Gym Workout Black
highlights: Adaptive Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling & Clear Calls: blocking up to 99.8% of noise with deep -50dB reduction in just 0.02s. Driven by a high-speed ANC chip and layered sound sensors, these noise cancelling earbuds auto-adjust to planes, subways, offices, and workouts for precision quiet. Switch to Transparency Mode to hear traffic or teammates safely. Multi-mic voice boost and wind-noise control keep every call sharp and clear—ideal for commuters, travelers, remote work, and high-energy days.

80Hrs Battery Life with Power Display Case: Keep your music, calls, and podcasts going through long commutes, intense workouts, or travel adventures. Each earbud provides up to 8 hours per charge, while the 600mAh charging case extends total playtime to an incredible 80 hours. Quick-charge 10 minutes gives 2 hours instantly, and the dual LED display shows real-time battery for both bluetooth headphones and case, so you stay powered and worry-free all day.

Immersive Hi-Res Sound That Moves You: Turn every commute, workout, or home session into a live music experience. These earbuds wireless bluetooth feature certified Hi-Res audio with 13mm dynamic drivers, delivering crisp highs, rich mids, and deep bass for full-spectrum sound. Advanced real-time bass tuning and lossless-quality transmission make every track punch harder while Multi-mic call clarity keeps your voice natural and clear—perfect for daily use, gaming, and streaming.

Effortless Control, Anywhere You Go: Take full command of your music, calls, and playlists without stopping your flow. Physical buttons on these over ear earbuds let you play, pause, skip tracks, adjust volume, and answer calls instantly—even during commutes, workouts, or high-intensity sessions. The wireless charging case with Type-C port ensures quick top-ups anytime, keeping your ear buds powered, responsive, and ready for music, podcasts, or calls all day.

Secure Comfort That Moves With You: Experience all-day stability and comfort with these noise cancelling headphones featuring over-ear hooks and an ergonomic design that keeps your wireless earbuds secure during intense workouts, runs, or outdoor activities. The lightweight, pressure-free fit adapts to every ear shape while maintaining reliable performance in motion. From morning commutes to high-intensity training sessions, enjoy uninterrupted music, clear calls, and confidence with every step.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 21, 2026
reviews.title: great value and sound quality
reviews.body: Amazing customer support!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 15, 2026
reviews.title: Awesome Head Set. :)
reviews.body: The wireless Earbuds are the best ever. they are easy to put on, they fit really good, they don't fall out, they have the best sound ever. Really good bass sounds. Finally someone made a great product.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 22, 2026
reviews.title: Impressive Sound & Noise Cancellation for the Price!
reviews.body: These earbuds exceeded my expectations! The sound quality is crisp and balanced, with deep bass that doesn’t overpower the mids and highs. The active noise cancellation actually works — it blocks out background noise really well, which makes a huge difference when I’m on calls or just trying to enjoy music without distractions.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: Holy Crap.
reviews.body: I do not write a lot of reviews, so a product has to be VERY compelling for me to write one. These earbuds are FIRE. Other than full-sized headphones, they are probably the best quality buds I've ever had. WAY better than the JBL over-ear buds. It's not even close. They're super loud. The base is crispy and doesnt crack. I was truly shocked by the quality from the moment I played the first song.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2026
reviews.title: Great price, great sound and super comfortable!
reviews.body: I basically use them for riding my bike, walking and hiking; they are comfortable and they never fall off. The sound quality is excellent and it’s easy to start and stop music with a push of the button that’s easy to find. The battery life seems very good, and you can see from the charging case exactly how much you you have left. I highly recommend this product to anyone who is quality and value conscious.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026
reviews.title: Great Earbuds for Runners and anyone else!
reviews.body: I purchased these looking for an additional set of earbuds, but I got a lot more than I expected.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026
reviews.title: Happy!
reviews.body: I’m honestly so happy with this purchase. The quality exceeded my expectations right out of the box. Everything feels well-made, sturdy, and thoughtfully designed.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 23, 2026
reviews.title: So far so good
reviews.body: For the price you can’t beat them. They were great and they stay in my ear. That’s all that counts to me and the sound is very well also.
